title: Day 6: Day 06 — Cold Outreach
content:
# Day 06 — Cold Outreach

## Topic
Cold Outreach

## 3–5 Key Points
1. Treat cold outreach like lead generation: consistent daily activity beats occasional bursts.
2. Expired listing outreach can surface productive agents who are open to better support.
3. In-person office drop-ins/door knocking still work when you lead with curiosity, not a pitch.
4. LinkedIn InMails perform best when personalized to the agent’s market, niche, and recent activity.
5. Track every touchpoint so follow-up is intentional and measurable.

## Why It Matters
Most recruiting pipelines fail because there isn’t enough top-of-funnel activity. Cold outreach gives you control over pipeline volume instead of waiting on referrals. If done consistently and professionally, it creates a predictable flow of recruiting conversations.
